action.reasoning: Observation: empty workspace. Analysis: need a fast validated baseline per instructions. Decision: implement ConvNeXt-Tiny pretrained fine-tuning with class-balanced sampling, GPU preprocessing from 32x32 to 224, train 3 epochs, save best checkpoint, and immediately submit evaluation to validate predict.py and measure runtime.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 3 --batch_size 128 --num_workers 2 --out checkpoints/best.pt && mkdir -p tmp_pred && cp /data/val.pt tmp_pred/test.pt && python predict.py --data_path tmp_pred --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output tmp_pred/preds.json

eval_result.eval_log:

  checkpoint:  /workspace/checkpoints/best.pt
  data_path:   /data
  output:      /experiments/iter_001/eval_result_predictions.json
